content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (May 31, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
May 31 saw significant progress in Eliza Cloud infrastructure, focusing on metered billing, containerized agent routing, and security hardening. Development efforts also prioritized desktop cross-platform stability, CI/CD reliability for agent images, and the expansion of the orchestrator workbench.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Metering**
*   Implemented signed webhook emission for credit money paths and forwarded per-inference spend to the waifu burn meter ([#8094](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8094), [#8089](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8089)).
*   Enabled provisioned agents to run in their own containers, routing traffic via the sandbox registry instead of in-process ([#8073](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8073)).

**Security & Stability Hardening**
*   Implemented mandatory confirmation for destructive actions across multiple plugins (wallet, LifeOps, GitHub, etc.) and sanitized environment injection for MCP spawns ([#8076](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8076)).
*   Resolved CI agent image boot failures by deriving runtime dependency closures and adding necessary modules ([#8079](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8079)).
*   Improved core message handling by replacing regex-based intent detection with structural preference logic and ensuring original replies are preserved during regeneration ([#8071](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8071), [#8045](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8045)).

**Desktop & Orchestrator Enhancements**
*   Refined the `/orchestrator` coding-agent workbench and improved app-shell startup robustness ([#8066](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8066)).
*   Enabled cross-platform desktop builds (Electrobun) with environment-driven whitelabel branding ([#8074](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8074)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Cloud & Routing:** [#8104](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8104), [#8070](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8070), [#8069](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8069).
*   **Orchestrator & Agents:** [#8098](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8098), [#8097](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8097), [#8095](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8095), [#8085](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8085), [#8080](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8080).
*   **CI/CD & Infrastructure:** [#8102](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8102), [#8084](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8084), [#8083](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8083), [#8078](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8078), [#8077](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8077), [#8068](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8068).
*   **UI & UX:** [#8093](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8093), [#8088](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8088), [#8082](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8082).
*   **Fixes & Maintenance:** [#8103](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8103), [#8096](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8096), [#8092](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8092), [#8091](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8091), [#8090](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8090), [#8087](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8087), [#8086](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8086).

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were closed during this period.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Build & Integration Failures:** [#8099](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8099) (develop build failure following confirmation rollout).
*   **Capability Gaps:** [#8100](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8100) (lack of inline live-info for non-Anthropic models).
*   **Diagnostics:** [#8101](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8101) (JSON-RPC error data being discarded, making debugging difficult).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were identified.*
